purpose: raw#9 hexa-only ω-cycle. TRAINED p4 round progression (r4/r5/r6/r7 vs r8) V2 multi-axis PAPO + V_pairrank trajectory. D-mistral swap (r8) effect isolation + r7 D-qwen14 attempt impact 직접 substrate-level 측정.
method: 기존 도구 (tool/an11_b_v2_papo_multi_axis.hexa, tool/an11_b_v_pairrank.hexa) 재사용. forward 미수행. r8_n50k variant (50k samples? — same 16 prompts) 비교 포함.

r4.interpretation: Dual-lever peak. V2 substrate-level strongest of all measured cells. V_pairrank top3 16.7% (1/6 paired tokens nearest-neighbor 안).

r5.interpretation: p4 r5에서도 V_pairrank top3 16.7% 유지 (p1 r5는 0%). p4 path가 V_pairrank lever longer 유지.

r6.interpretation: V_pairrank top3 0%로 떨어짐. V2 lift 약화. p4 path V_pairrank lever 소실 시점.

r7.interpretation: D-qwen14 attempt (axis 4 FALSIFIED, project_phi_gate_r7_falsified)가 V2 + V_pairrank 모두 dip. V2 PASS 손실 (AMBIGUOUS). dual-dip event.

r8.interpretation: D-mistral swap (axis 4 H4b VALIDATED). V2 recovery (0.160→0.366) but r5/r6 수준 (0.31~0.33) 미달. V_pairrank는 회복 못함 (0.091). architecture closure를 integration보다 우선했다는 §5 trade-off 직접 substrate-level 증명.

r8_n50k.interpretation: n50k = 50k sample LoRA training but same 16-prompt evaluation set. eval H representation은 r8과 byte-identical. sample size는 16-prompt eval에 무영향 (확인됨).

F1_p4_r4_dual_lever_peak.claim: p4 r4 = V2 lift 0.563 + V_pairrank 0.200 (top3 16.7%) — measured cells 중 strongest dual-lever
F1_p4_r4_dual_lever_peak.comparison: p1 r4: V2 lift 0.507 + V_pairrank 0.254 — p1 V_pairrank 더 강함, p4 V2 더 강함
F1_p4_r4_dual_lever_peak.implication: r4-equivalent epoch이 path-invariant sweet spot이지만 path별 lever 강도 다름. p1 = V_pairrank-strong, p4 = V2-strong.

F2_p4_v_pairrank_longer_persistence.claim: p4 path는 V_pairrank top3 16.7%이 r4 + r5 두 round 유지 (p1은 r4 단독)
F2_p4_v_pairrank_longer_persistence.interpretation: p4 D-mistral preparation의 별도 architecture가 V_pairrank lever를 longer 유지. fine-tune trajectory 내에서 paired retrieval geometry decay rate path-dependent.

F3_r7_D_qwen14_dual_dip.claim: r7 D-qwen14 attempt (project_phi_gate_r7_falsified)가 V2 + V_pairrank 모두 substrate-level break
F3_r7_D_qwen14_dual_dip.implication: D-qwen14 architecture가 dual-lever anti-lever. project_phi_gate_r7_falsified.md (Axis 4 architecture manifold 가설)와 일관.

F4_r8_V2_only_recovery.claim: r8 D-mistral swap이 V2 회복 (0.160→0.366) but V_pairrank 회복 못함 (0.088→0.091)
F4_r8_V2_only_recovery.interpretation: D-mistral은 V2 surrogate에 align (paired axes structure 회복), but V_pairrank의 retrieval geometry는 architecture 변경으로도 회복 안 됨. 두 lever orthogonality + V_pairrank fragility 추가 증명.
F4_r8_V2_only_recovery.supports: Mk.XI architectural retrieval head 필요성 — fine-tune-time architecture swap (D-mistral)으로도 V_pairrank 회복 안 되므로 dedicated retrieval head 외 다른 방법 없음.

F5_n50k_sample_size_invariant.interpretation: 16-prompt eval set은 LoRA training sample size (16k vs 50k samples)에 무관 — eval H representation이 동일. sample size는 training trajectory에는 영향 미치지만 16-prompt eval에는 영향 없음. raw#15 SSOT consistency 확인.

implications_for_Mk_XI.r4_early_stop_path_invariant: p1 + p4 모두 r4 dual-lever peak — Mk.XI r4 early-stop spec (state/mk_xi_r4_monitor_spec_20260425.json) path-invariant validation
implications_for_Mk_XI.D_mistral_V2_only_lever: D-mistral swap이 V2 lever만 강화, V_pairrank 별도 architectural lever (retrieval head, Mk.XI #97 §3.3) 필요성 추가 강화
implications_for_Mk_XI.D_qwen14_anti_lever: r7 D-qwen14는 dual anti-lever — architecture 선택 시 D-mistral 또는 등가, D-qwen14 회피

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — k=6 trivial PASS 명시 (rank exhaustion), V_pairrank FAIL 정직 보고, 'V_pairrank 회복 못함' 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — same tools, same predicates as p1/p2/p3 measurements
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for p4 progression finding; per-round results in an11_v2_papo_multi_axis_p4_TRAINED_*_20260425.json + an11_v_pairrank_p4_TRAINED_*_20260425.json
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (round progression + D-mistral isolation) → impl (measurement + finding) → fixpoint marker
